meaning: adj.灰白的,(因年迈而)头发灰白的,古代的,久远的
examples: Televiewers, sick of hoary Hoot Gibson oaters and antique spook comedies, wonder when, if ever, they will see fresh, first-class Hollywood films.
And though the fields look rough with hoary dew.
On the one hand was sacred grave, on the other hoary locks.
The hoary slogan 'Not sold in stores' has become the exception to the rule.
It's a hoary example but worth repeating: Toyota's launch vehicle was a Corona, not a Lexus.
